case_title: ANNE KIHAGI VS. SOMMERS & SCHWARTZ, LLP, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-29-2017 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUL-19-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST ANNE KIHAG, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: MAR-06-2018, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAR-22-2018. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-06-2018 CONTINUED TO JUN-12-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S); PAY OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR NOV-28-2017 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST ANNE KIHAGI, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: NOV-28-2017, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE DEC-14-2017. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF KIHAGI, ANNE AN INDIVIDUAL
MINI MINUTES FOR MAR-06-2018 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-12-2018 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
MINI MINUTES FOR AUG-29-2017 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING JUN-12-2018 AT 10:30 AM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PROFESSIONAL NEGLIGENCE, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KIHAGI, ANNE AN INDIVIDUAL AS TO DEFENDANT SOMMERS & SCHWARTZ, LLP, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY SOMMERS ESQ, FRANK F. calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-14-2018 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
No appeareance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or an objection filed, the Court orders the case dismissed. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-07-2018 Continued To Jun-12-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Self-represented Plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set June 12, 2018 at 10:30 am, in Department 610. Judge: Teri L. Jackson; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-29-2017 Continued To Mar-06-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Self-represented Plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set March 6, 2018 at 10:30 am, in Department 610. Judge: A. James Robertson, II; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-29-2017 Continued To Nov-28-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Self-represented Plaintiff Anne Kihagi appearing on her own behalf. The OSC is re-set to November 28, 2017 at 10:30 am in Department 610. Judge: Suzanne R. Bolanos; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-03-2017 Set For Order To Show Cause On Aug-29-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
